meta.title: SaaSPro — All-in-One Business Platform
meta.description: Manage clients, automate workflows, track analytics, and grow your business.

hero.desc: Manage clients, automate workflows, track analytics, and grow — all in one place. Replace the messy combo of spreadsheets, emails, and disconnected tools.
hero.footnote: No credit card required. Free for up to 10 clients.

features.heading: Everything you need to scale your business
features.subtitle: Purpose-built for growing teams. Not bloated enterprise software with features you'll never touch.

items.title: Smart Analytics
items.desc: Real-time dashboards with actionable insights. Track revenue, client growth, engagement, and key metrics at a glance.

items.title: Team Collaboration
items.desc: Workspaces with role-based access, shared calendars, task assignments, and built-in messaging. Keep everyone on the same page.

items.title: Integrations & Automations
items.desc: Connect with Stripe, Slack, Google Workspace, and more. Automate repetitive tasks like invoicing, reminders, and data sync.

footer.tagline: The all-in-one platform for modern businesses

pricing.title: Choose the right plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade as you grow
